name: Blueberry-Cheese Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 package Refrigerated sugar cookie dough (18 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to moderate (350°F).
2. Press dough evenly in a greased 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
3. Beat cream cheese, egg, sugar and lemon rind in a medium-size bowl with an electric mixer until smooth. Spread cheese mixture over cookie dough.
4. Dollop blueberry pie filling on cheese; swirl with a knife or small metal spatula.
5. Bake in preheated moderate oven (350°F) for 35 minutes.
6. Cool on wire racks.
7. Cut into bars.
8. Refrigerate. Makes 48 bar cookies.
